## Preceding prose

> Within the [tune body](#tune_body_definition "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵"), all the printable ASCII characters may be used for the [music code](#music_code_definition "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵"). These are:
> Of these, the following characters are currently reserved:
> In future standards they may be used to extend the abc syntax.
> To ensure forward compatibility, current software should ignore these characters when they appear inside or between note groups, possibly giving a warning.
